ops.body: DONE — shipped. The ask_user_question detector (Python + full Rust parity) shipped in cc-transcript (released on the 8.x line, now at 9.0.0) and is wired into cc-steer (formerly cc-pushback) via 03552de: question_answer flows through models source-kinds, detectors parts()/payload_of(), and triage KIND_QUOTAS, with ordinal picks resolved to labels. It is live in production: question_answer is now the largest feedback kind (2564 rows of 4416). Superseding local branches (feat/question-answer-wiring, feat/auq-wiring) were deleted after confirming main carries the content. Closing under the cc-steer rename (project renamed cc-pushback → cc-steer, now v0.10.0 / cc-transcript 9).
